articles.author: Kaia  Hubbard
articles.title: Iranian foreign minister says "we don't see any reason why we should talk with Americans" - CBS News
articles.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said that "we don't see any reason why we should talk with Americans" as President Trump has claimed Iran is seeking a deal to end the war between the U.S. and Iran.
articles.content: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said Sunday that "we don't see any reason why we should talk with Americans" as President Trump has claimed Iran is seeking a deal to end the war between the U… [+2331 chars]
